about.title: About — Bilal Essatte
about.metaDesc: Bilal Essatte — Graphic & Web Designer based in Tangier, Morocco. Self-taught since 2016, agency experience at WeProd Maroc.
about.missionQuote: I don't just design. I solve problems — wherever you put me, I adapt.

services.title: Services — Bilal Essatte
services.metaDesc: Graphic design, web design, branding, social media and SEO services by Bilal Essatte.
services.heroDesc: From brand identity to web design — I handle the full visual side of your business.
services.ctaDesc: Tell me about your project and let's see how I can help.
services.s1_desc: A clear, consistent visual identity that makes your brand recognizable and memorable.
services.s2_desc: Clean, fast websites that represent your brand and convert visitors into clients.
services.s3_desc: Visual content that keeps your audience engaged and your brand consistent.
services.s4_desc: Image retouching and visual production to make your products and spaces look their best.
services.s5_desc: Better visibility on search engines, starting with a solid technical and content foundation.
